sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_degrees (angle_in_radians Float64, angle_in_degrees Float64);
INSERT INTO test_degrees (angle_in_radians, angle_in_degrees) VALUES (3.141592653589793, degrees(3.141592653589793));
INSERT INTO test_degrees (angle_in_radians, angle_in_degrees) VALUES (1.5707963267948966, degrees(1.5707963267948966));
SELECT angle_in_radians, angle_in_degrees FROM test_degrees WHERE angle_in_degrees > 0;
UPDATE test_degrees SET angle_in_degrees = degrees(angle_in_radians) WHERE angle_in_degrees IS NULL;
